creator: yom@iaelu.net
text:
(In reply to Matthias Fechner from comment #4)
These are the packages remaining after uninstalling www/gitlab-ce and autoremoving the 756 dependencies packages:

```
# pkg info -a -o
gettext-runtime-0.22.3_1       devel/gettext-runtime

indexinfo-0.3.1                print/indexinfo
libedit-3.1.20230828_1,1       devel/libedit

liblz4-1.9.4_1,1               archivers/liblz4
libunwind-20240112             devel/libunwind
libxml2-2.11.7                 textproc/libxml2
libyaml-0.2.5                  textproc/libyaml
llvm15-15.0.7_10               devel/llvm15
lua53-5.3.6_1                  lang/lua53
mpdecimal-2.5.1                math/mpdecimal
nginx-1.24.0_15,3              www/nginx
pcre2-10.43                    devel/pcre2
perl5-5.36.3_1                 lang/perl5.36
pkg-1.20.9_1                   ports-mgmt/pkg
postgresql15-client-15.6       databases/postgresql15-client
postgresql15-contrib-15.6      databases/postgresql15-contrib
postgresql15-server-15.6       databases/postgresql15-server

ruby32-gems-3.4.20             devel/ruby-gems
rubygem-concurrent-ruby-1.2.3  devel/rubygem-concurrent-ruby
rubygem-i18n-1.12.0,2          devel/rubygem-i18n
sccache-overlay-0.2.15_25      ports-mgmt/sccache-overlay
```
